tasks.completion_summary: Task already complete - all 13 spec files exist from previous loop session covering IHistoryStore, ICompletionProvider, SQLite schema, autosuggestions, plugin architecture, config format, keybindings, FlagSpecs extraction, and implementation phases.

Created docs/specs/architecture-overview.md with component diagram showing InteractiveShell, LineEditor, BashTranspiler, PwshWorker, and plugin system. Added data flow diagrams for Tab, Up/Down, Right/End keys, typing, and Enter. Includes component responsibilities table and references to existing specs.

Created docs/specs/lineeditor-vt100-design.md documenting VT100 escape sequences, rendering strategy, Unicode/wide character handling approach, platform compatibility (Windows Console API fallback), key-by-key input loop, multi-line input detection, kill ring design, and tab completion integration.
